name: Timeline Carousel
description: This block displays a carousel with an axis in the middle. Note: you can only add more items by adding more years on the main axis, or the additional slides won’t render.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Author this block using the repeatable item structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

usageNotes: -timeline-years: creates a cell for each year in the carousel
Documented sample names: With start position at the end.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
